queries.question: For each software company, list the corresponding description of job positions.
queries.sql: select software_companies.company_name , job_positions.description from Software_Companies_Job_Positions join Job_Positions on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id = Job_Positions.id join Software_Companies on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id = Software_Companies.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?company_name ?description WHERE {
  ?software_companies_job_positions a :Software_Companies_Job_Positions .
  ?job_positions a :Job_Positions .
  ?software_companies_job_positions p:hasJob_Positions ?job_positions .
  ?software_companies a :Software_Companies .
  ?software_companies_job_positions p:hasSoftware_Companies ?software_companies .
  ?software_companies p:company_name ?company_name .
  ?job_positions p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: List the common description of job positions for all software companies.
queries.sql: SELECT Job_Positions.description  from Software_Companies_Job_Positions join Job_Positions on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id = Job_Positions.id join Software_Companies on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id = Software_Companies.id   GROUP BY Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Software_Companies)

queries.question: which job titles and descriptions are associated with each software company?
queries.sql: SELECT Job_Positions.position_title, Job_Positions.description  from Software_Companies_Job_Positions join Job_Positions on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id = Job_Positions.id join Software_Companies on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id = Software_Companies.id   GROUP BY Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Software_Companies)

queries.question: which job titles and descriptions are associated with each software company?
queries.sql: select software_companies.company_name , job_positions.position_title , job_positions.description from Software_Companies_Job_Positions join Job_Positions on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id = Job_Positions.id join Software_Companies on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id = Software_Companies.id

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?company_name ?position_title ?description WHERE {
  ?software_companies_job_positions a :Software_Companies_Job_Positions .
  ?job_positions a :Job_Positions .
  ?software_companies_job_positions p:hasJob_Positions ?job_positions .
  ?software_companies a :Software_Companies .
  ?software_companies_job_positions p:hasSoftware_Companies ?software_companies .
  ?software_companies p:company_name ?company_name .
  ?job_positions p:position_title ?position_title .

}

queries.question: Tell me the jobs every software company has.
queries.sql: SELECT Job_Positions.position_title  from Software_Companies_Job_Positions join Job_Positions on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id = Job_Positions.id join Software_Companies on Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id = Software_Companies.id   GROUP BY Software_Companies_Job_Positions.job_position_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Software_Companies_Job_Positions.software_company_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Software_Companies)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display the description of job positions available at each software company.
Tell me the jobs every software company has.
which job titles and descriptions are associated with each software company?
